\scriptscriptstyle\frac{5/8⟨13⟩[24]²⟨34⟩[𝟓4]⟨1𝟓⟩s_{234}s_{𝟓}}{⟨1|2+3|4]³Δ_{14|23|𝟓}} +\\
\scriptscriptstyle\frac{-35/32[12]⟨13⟩²[24]⟨4|2+3|1][𝟓4]⟨1𝟓⟩s_{234}s_{𝟓}}{⟨1|2+3|4]²Δ_{14|23|𝟓}²} +\\
\scriptscriptstyle\frac{⟨13⟩²[24]s_{234}s_{𝟓}(s_{123}-s_{234})[12](5/16⟨2𝟓⟩[𝟓2]+5/16⟨3𝟓⟩[𝟓3]+5/8⟨4𝟓⟩[𝟓4])}{⟨1|2+3|4]²Δ_{14|23|𝟓}²} +\\
\scriptscriptstyle\frac{2⟨34⟩⟨3|2+4|3][𝟓|𝟓|4⟩⟨4𝟓⟩}{[23]⟨24⟩³⟨1|2+3|4]} +\\
\scriptscriptstyle\frac{1[24]⟨34⟩[𝟓|𝟓|2+4|3]⟨4𝟓⟩}{[23]⟨24⟩²[34]⟨1|2+3|4]} +\\
\scriptscriptstyle\frac{-2⟨34⟩[𝟓|𝟓|2+3|4]⟨4𝟓⟩}{⟨24⟩²[34]⟨1|2+3|4]} +\\
\scriptscriptstyle\frac{-2[24]⟨34⟩[𝟓|𝟓|2⟩⟨4𝟓⟩}{⟨24⟩²[34]⟨1|2+3|4]} \phantom{+}
\end{gathered}$
\end{my}
